provider: HKU Department of Data and Systems Engineering BEng(DASE) syllabus
note: The official syllabus applies to students admitted in 2025-26 and thereafter. It publishes a suggested study plan, so recommendedYear is guidance rather than a compulsory year assignment. AILTXXXX, CC##XXXX, non-credit national education requirements and the open 12-credit Elective pool are excluded because they do not identify a closed coded course list. DASE3134 and DASE4135 appear in the annual offering list but not in the current DASE syllabus and are also excluded. No Semester is inferred except the explicitly dual-semester DASE4174 Project.
